query: I need a completely unbiased second opinion on this — spin up a subagent that doesn't have our persona or rules loaded

run a blind semantic check: do these two log lines mean the same thing, without any of our project context biasing the answer

spin up a claude session with no CLAUDE.md, no rules, nothing loaded — just the bare harness
I want to verify what persona actually gets injected by default, without our own persona overriding it
get me an independent read on this design doc that isn't colored by our SOLID/DRY house rules
launch a virgin-context agent to judge whether this docstring actually matches what the code does

spin up a subagent to review this PR for me
delegate this task to a cheaper OpenRouter model, maybe Kimi or GLM

run this refactor through Kimi K2.7 using our openrouter setup
launch a general-purpose subagent to grep the codebase for TODO comments

use --model haiku for a cheap triage pass over these files
set up a background agent to poll CI status every few minutes
